name: azahrabot
description: AzahraBot — Advanced WhatsApp bot with AI, media tools, fun commands and moderation.

scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator src/index.js --output index.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --self-defending true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator src/main.js --output main.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --self-defending true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator src/lib/small_lib.js --output lib/small_lib.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --self-defending true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator src/utils/menuData.js --output utils/menuData.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --self-defending true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64

author: AzarTech
